features.title: GitHub Webhooks Integration
features.description: Replace polling with real-time PR updates via webhooks

features.title: Review Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Show stats: reviews per week, issues by severity, average review time, AI model performance comparison

features.title: PR Filtering & Search
features.description: Filter by author, labels, size, date range; search by title/description

features.title: Review Templates
features.description: Save custom prompts for different review types (security audit, performance check, API review)

features.title: Batch/Queue Reviews
features.description: Queue multiple PRs for sequential automated review instead of one-at-a-time

features.title: Auto-Review on Sync
features.description: Option to automatically start reviews when new PRs are synced

features.title: Review Scheduling
features.description: Schedule reviews for off-hours or recurring reviews

features.title: Draft Comment Mode
features.description: Edit/curate AI comments before submitting to GitHub

features.title: Review Iteration Diff
features.description: Compare what changed between review iterations visually

features.title: Multi-Repository Dashboard
features.description: Cross-repo overview with aggregated metrics

features.title: CI/CD Integration
features.description: Webhook endpoint for CI events; optionally block merges based on review results

features.title: Slack/Discord Notifications
features.description: Alert when reviews complete or critical issues found

features.title: Linear/JIRA Integration
features.description: Link PRs to tickets, auto-update ticket status on review completion

features.title: Code Coverage Overlay
features.description: Display test coverage data alongside review comments

features.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
features.description: Navigate kanban board, trigger actions without mouse

features.title: Dark/Light Theme Toggle
features.description: Currently appears to use CSS variables—make it user-selectable

features.title: PR Size Warnings
features.description: Flag large PRs (>500 lines) as hard to review effectively

features.title: Stale PR Detection
features.description: Highlight PRs sitting >7 days without review

features.title: Export Reviews
features.description: Download review as Markdown/PDF for documentation

features.title: Custom Severity Rules
features.description: Configure what constitutes critical/major/minor per project

features.title: Review Confidence Scoring
features.description: AI assigns confidence levels to each finding

features.title: Dependency Security Scan
features.description: Flag vulnerable dependencies in PR changes

features.title: Review Presets
features.description: One-click configurations (e.g., "Quick Check" vs "Deep Dive")

features.title: Comment Threading
features.description: Track GitHub comment conversations in Forge

features.title: Suggested Review Conclusion
features.description: AI suggests final review action: request changes if critical issues found, comment for minor suggestions, or approve if clean
